string.text:
Semi-military model of an exoskeleton without heavy armor. The absence of heavy plating allows the operator to move faster. Used by stalkers for transporting heavy loads.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] universal application
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] used for item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] can be used as a stash

Upgraded version of the Raytheon XOS 3 Exoskeleton. The increased structural weight also comes with an increased carrying capacity. Used by the U.S. military and various PMCs.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] universal application
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] used for item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] can be used as a stash
